title: Embassy Office Parks REIT is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Embassy Office Parks REIT is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Property Advisor looking for your next big career move? Embassy Office Parks REIT in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Embassy Office Parks REIT:
Embassy Office Parks REIT is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Embassy Office Parks REIT!
